title: Puzzle Map Match
description: A first geography sorting game where kids match animals to habitat and farm or wild places.
learningGoals: Connect animals with simple home-place categories
Build hot, cold, ocean, farm, and wild vocabulary
Practice first geography through concrete animal examples
interactionModel: sort-into-bins drag or tap-tap animals into place bins
feedbackModel: Correct sorts get pop and sparkle SFX plus spoken praise; misses wiggle gently with a spoken nudge and retry.
credits: Kaigani; emoji placeholder art only (see ASSETS.md). Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
